scripts.check: node --check js/app.js && node --check js/data.js && node --check api/create-checkout-session.js && node --check api/health.js && node --check scripts/build.mjs && python3 -m json.tool manifest.webmanifest >/dev/null
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:open: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
